---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# New Research Design

1.  Demonstrate lack of variation for non-HR municipalities.

2.  Calculate cross-elasticity of the levy and the tax base.

    A.  Homerule Munis

    B.  Schools

Goals: Assemble needed data and balance panel data.

# Lack of Variation in non-HR Munis

First step is to demonstrate a lack of variation in non-HR Munis. Let's
create the necessary dataframe and generate some descriptive statistics.

## Generate DF

1.  Read in agency_raw_joined.csv from helper file. Load tidyverse.

```{r, message = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)

agency_df <- read_csv("agency_raw_joined.csv")
```

```{r}


```
